title:
PROMPT 011: Coffee Cup вЂ” Steam Rising
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1080px (1:1)
DURATION: 3.0s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Coffee cup (6 paths: cup body, handle, rim, saucer, 3 steam wave paths) вЂ” centered 540Г—560px, 110px wide

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #1C0A00 (very dark espresso brown)
Cup fill: #D4A96A (warm tan/latte)
Cup stroke: #A0522D (sienna brown, 2px)
Handle fill: #D4A96A
Rim fill: #F5E6C8 (cream)
Steam stroke: #F5E6C880 (cream, 50% opacity, 3px, no fill, rounded linecap)
Saucer fill: #A0522D

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Cup sits on saucer, centered. Three steam wavy paths rise from rim: left-offset, center, right-offset.
Each steam path is a gentle S-curve, 50px tall above rim.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.0s loopable):
0вЂ“0.4s: Cup and saucer fade in (opacity 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out).
0.4вЂ“0.7s: Rim fades in. Handle fades in.
0.7вЂ“1.0s: Steam path 1 (left) strokes upward (dashoffset 100% в†’ 0%, ease-out) + translates Y +0 в†’ -15px.
0.9вЂ“1.2s: Steam path 2 (center) strokes upward (staggered 0.2s).
1.1вЂ“1.4s: Steam path 3 (right) strokes upward (staggered 0.2s).
1.4вЂ“2.4s: All three steam paths rise continuously (Y translate -15px в†’ -50px) while fading out (opacity 1.0 в†’ 0, ease-in). Loop Y position resets to -15px.
2.4вЂ“3.0s: New steam loop starts (paths re-draw from 0), overlapping with fade of previous.

EASING CURVES:
- Cup/saucer fade: ease-out
- Steam draw: ease-out
- Steam rise: linear
- Steam fade: ease-in
